title: perezia sublyrata
intro: Perezia sublyrata, also known as Yellowtop, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Perezia sublyrata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits.
